attackPattern.message: Scatters under the utility shelf
Triggers a suspicious sneeze
Rolls with silent accusation

fight.message: You swat it with grim domestic purpose.

dadSkill.message: You take a Deep Sigh. The dust is unmoved by maturity.

initiative.ambushMessage: Dust Bunny erupts from beneath the utility shelf.

attackPattern.message: Hurls itself at Dad with absolute personal grievance
Performs a dramatic rolling charge straight at Dad's ankles
Emits a cloud of malicious lint
Stares Dad down with the fury of years of neglect

fight.message: You swat it. It bounces back. It is angrier now.

dadSkill.message: You take a Deep Sigh. The dust bunny takes this as an insult.

initiative.ambushMessage: An Angry Dust Bunny launches itself from beneath the dryer before Dad can react.

name: Freaky Icky Spider
emotionalMeaning: Primal fear of things with too many legs

attackPattern.message: Skitters directly toward Dad's shoe
Deploys Too Many Legs in a distressing configuration
Drops from the ceiling at approximately face height
Freezes and stares. Dad stares back. Damage is mostly emotional.

fight.message: Dad strikes with the authority of a man who has seen enough legs.

dadSkill.message: Dad takes a Deep Sigh. The spider uses this opportunity to move closer.

initiative.ambushMessage: The Freaky Icky Spider drops from the ceiling directly above Dad.

attackPattern.message: Radiates warranty anxiety
Snaps with static judgment
Whispers about installation fees

fight.message: You strike the coil. It flexes like a warranty exclusion.

dadSkill.message: You take a Deep Sigh. The coil briefly remembers it was manufactured to serve.

initiative.ambushMessage: The Evil Heating Coil glows before you can brace yourself.

attackPattern.message: Unspools dramatically and gets everywhere
Disintegrates ominously mid-fight, which is somehow worse
Rolls under the cabinet, daring Dad to chase it

fight.message: You swat it. It tears apart with shameful ease.

dadSkill.message: You take a Deep Sigh. Sam was never going to make it anyway.

initiative.ambushMessage: Single-Ply Sam unrolls from behind the cabinet before Dad can react.

name: Olfactory Ninja
emotionalMeaning: A stink bomb waiting to happen

attackPattern.message: Vanishes in a cloud of pure offense
Deploys a silent-but-deadly smoke bomb
Strikes from the shadows of the exhaust fan

fight.message: Dad swings through the cloud, mostly out of spite.

dadSkill.message: You take a Deep Sigh. Tactically, this was a mistake in here.

initiative.ambushMessage: The Olfactory Ninja strikes before Dad even registers the smell.

attackPattern.message: Oozes onto Dad's shoe with minty menace
Sticks Dad's fingers together in a show of dominance
Sprays a fine mist of fluoride-scented contempt

fight.message: Dad strikes. It splatters, then reforms, vaguely smug.

dadSkill.message: You take a Deep Sigh. The slime takes this personally.

initiative.ambushMessage: The Toothpaste Slime drops from the medicine cabinet shelf.

attackPattern.message: Spreads slightly, somehow making the grout worse
Releases a spore cloud of pure landlord-deposit dread
Just sits there, multiplying, judging

fight.message: You scrub it. It clings to the grout with quiet defiance.

dadSkill.message: You take a Deep Sigh. The mold does not care about your feelings.

initiative.ambushMessage: The Mold Patch has been waiting behind the shower curtain the entire time.

attackPattern.message: Gurgles with rising, deeply concerning pressure
Threatens to overflow with biblical confidence
Backs up in a way that voids several warranties

fight.message: Dad strikes the bowl. It gurgles in defiance.

dadSkill.message: Dad summons Porcelain Courage. The clog briefly considers its life choices.

initiative.ambushMessage: The Clogged Toilet groans ominously before Dad can brace himself.
